evidence.source_title: Exiled Iranian journalist Pouria Zeraati stabbed in London
evidence.description: The Metropolitan Police Counter Terrorism Command led the investigation into the stabbing of Pouria Zeraati, treating it as a potential state-directed attack.

editorial_notes: SO15 investigated the 29 March 2024 stabbing of Zeraati in Wimbledon as a potential Iranian state-directed assassination attempt.
